name: Texoma Tamales
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Texas red sauce or original salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the lard until light and creamy.
2. Mix dry ingredients (masa harina, salt, baking powder) in a bowl.
3. Gradually beat the dry mixture into the lard until well combined.
4. Add chicken broth gradually to form a light, soft dough.
5. Spread half of the dough in the bottom of a greased 10x7x1.5 inch baking pan.
6. Spoon chili evenly over the dough.
7. Carefully spread the remaining dough over the chili.
8. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
9. Cut crosswise into 8 tamale shapes.
10. Makes 4 servings.
